blocks.produce_part_tooltip: Produce a part of the specified type
blocks.set_recipe_tooltip: Set the recipe for a machine
blocks.set_belt_speed_tooltip: Set the speed of a conveyor belt
blocks.route_to_tooltip: Route items to the target machine
blocks.repeat_times_tooltip: Repeat the enclosed actions a number of times
blocks.while_condition_tooltip: Repeat while the condition is true
blocks.if_quality_tooltip: Check item quality against a threshold
blocks.set_variable_tooltip: Set a variable to a value
blocks.get_variable_tooltip: Get the value of a variable
blocks.change_variable_tooltip: Change a variable by an amount
blocks.on_order_received_tooltip: Run when a new order is received
blocks.on_machine_idle_tooltip: Run when a machine becomes idle

level_1.name: Hello Factory
level_1.description: Place machines, connect a belt, and build your first robot.

level_2.name: Assembly Line
level_2.description: Set up a sequence to stamp, assemble, and ship 3 robots.

level_3.name: Mass Production
level_3.description: Use loops to produce 10 parts efficiently.

level_4.name: Quality Matters
level_4.description: Use conditionals to route defective items to the recycler.

level_5.name: Smart Routing
level_5.description: Use variables and splitters to produce multiple robot types.

level_6.name: Custom Robots
level_6.description: Define functions to build three different robot models.

level_7.name: Rush Order!
level_7.description: React to events and meet a tight deadline.

level_8.name: Optimize Everything
level_8.description: Balance speed, cost, and quality to earn maximum stars.

level_9.name: Robot Expo
level_9.description: Sandbox showcase — build anything you want!

level_10.name: Factory Tycoon
level_10.description: Run a multi-line production facility for all robot types.

tutorial.step_1: Welcome! Click on the toolbar to select a machine type.
tutorial.step_2: Click on the grid to place your machine.
tutorial.step_3: Now select 'Place Belt' and connect your machines.
tutorial.step_4: Open the editor with the E key to write your program.
tutorial.step_5: Press Play to start the simulation and watch your factory!
tutorial.step_6: Use loops to repeat actions efficiently.
tutorial.step_7: Check item quality with conditionals to route defective items.
tutorial.step_8: Use variables to track counts and make decisions.
